animate.first_definition: any person in the armed services who holds a position of authority or command
(sports) someone in charge of training an athlete or a team
an officer holding a rank below a major but above a lieutenant
someone who originates or causes or initiates something
a person who operates a farm
a police officer who investigates crimes
a professional person authorized to practice law; conducts lawsuits or gives legal advice
a person who uses scientific knowledge to solve practical problems
a soldier in a motorized army unit
someone who is skilled at analyzing data

inanimate.first_definition: the remains of something that has been destroyed or broken up
a cataclysm resulting from a destructive sea wave caused by an earthquake or volcanic eruption
shaking and vibration at the surface of the earth resulting from underground movement along a fault plane of from volcanic activity
the remains of something that has been destroyed or broken up
the state of being covered with unclean things
a severe tropical cyclone usually with heavy rains and winds moving a 73-136 knots (12 on the Beaufort scale)
a state or condition being blighted
